name: Data Retention V1 Lean
description: R22 data retention workflow with oldest event data span and humanized notify reasons; preserves bounded cleanup, stale half-open repair, retention payload, and delivery/audit-aware timer.

parameters.query:
WITH del_events AS (
  DELETE FROM supervisor_events
  WHERE id IN (
    SELECT id FROM supervisor_events
    WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
    ORDER BY id
    LIMIT 1000
  )
  RETURNING id
),
stale_circuit AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET status = 'closed', error_count = 0, updated_at = NOW(), half_open_at = NULL
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status = 'open'
    AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND opened_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  RETURNING circuit_key, 'open' AS previous_status, status AS new_status
),
stale_half_open AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET status = 'closed', error_count = 0, updated_at = NOW(), half_open_at = NULL
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status = 'half_open'
    AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM stale_circuit)
  RETURNING circuit_key, 'half_open' AS previous_status, status AS new_status
),
half_open_invariant_repair AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET half_open_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status <> 'half_open'
    AND half_open_at IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING circuit_key
),
all_circuit_repairs AS (
  SELECT * FROM stale_circuit
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM stale_half_open
),
transition_log AS (
  INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
  SELECT
    'retention-stale-circuit-' || FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) * 1000)::BIGINT,
    'circuit_transition',
    'Data Retention',
    'retention',
    'warning',
    'closed',
    jsonb_build_object('from', previous_status, 'to', new_status, 'reason', 'retention_stale_circuit_reset')
  FROM all_circuit_repairs
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM del_events) AS deleted_events_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM all_circuit_repairs) AS stale_circuit_reset,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transition_log) AS stale_circuit_transition_logged,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stale_half_open) AS stale_half_open_reset_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM half_open_invariant_repair) AS half_open_invariant_repairs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supervisor_events) AS total_events,
  (SELECT MIN(created_at) FROM supervisor_events) AS oldest_event_at,
  (SELECT pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('supervisor_events'))) AS events_table_size,
  (SELECT pg_total_relation_size('supervisor_events')) AS events_table_size_bytes,
  (SELECT pg_size_pretty(pg_indexes_size('supervisor_events'))) AS events_index_size,
  (SELECT pg_indexes_size('supervisor_events')) AS events_index_size_bytes,
  (SELECT n_dead_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE relname = 'supervisor_events') AS dead_tuples,
  (SELECT n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE relname = 'supervisor_events') AS live_tuples,
  (SELECT last_autovacuum FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE relname = 'supervisor_events') AS last_autovacuum,
  (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(n_live_tup,0)+COALESCE(n_dead_tup,0)=0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0*COALESCE(n_dead_tup,0)/NULLIF(COALESCE(n_live_tup,0)+COALESCE(n_dead_tup,0),0),2) END FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE relname='supervisor_events') AS dead_tuple_pct,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schema_versions WHERE version = 'v1_lean') AS schema_version_present,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name IN ('circuit_state', 'supervisor_events', 'schema_versions')) AS expected_tables_found

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
VALUES (
  'retention-' || FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) * 1000)::BIGINT,
  'retention_completed',
  'Data Retention',
  'retention',
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'hasWarnings' = 'true' THEN 'warning' ELSE 'info' END,
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'hasWarnings' = 'true' THEN 'completed_with_warnings' ELSE 'completed' END,
  $1::jsonb
)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (() => { const base = JSON.parse($('Check Analyze Result').first().json.retentionPayloadBase || '{}'); const delivered = (() => { try { return !!$('Telegram (Retention Report)').first().json.message_id; } catch(e) { return false; } })(); base.telegram_delivered = String(delivered); base.hasWarnings = String(base.baseHasWarnings === 'true' || ($('Check Analyze Result').first().json.shouldNotify && !delivered)); delete base.baseHasWarnings; return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

parameters.content:
## 🧹 Data Retention V1 Lean (Round 22 Build)
**Every 12h: Cleanup → Evaluate → Analyze → Notify? → Log → Done**

**9 executable nodes + 1 sticky. R22 internal hardening, zero new nodes.**

- R22: Oldest event age / data span added
- R22: notifyReason labels humanized
- R21: top-line notify reason retained
- R20/R19: stale half_open circuit safety reset
- R20/R19: half_open_at invariant repair
- R17: telegram_delivered payload + delivery/audit-aware weekly timer
- Bounded delete: 90 days, LIMIT 1000
